case_title: PIER ANGELINE TRINIDAD VS. ZHOU DONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 200.00 - SERVED MAR-02-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, ZHOU DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND (2) DEFENDANTS. COURT CERTIFIED CANOTONESE INTERPRETER, MARILYN LUONG, TRANSLATES ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 200.00 - SERVED MAR-02-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, DONG DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRINIDAD, PIER ANGELINE AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, ZHOU DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER ZHOU, DONG DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD, PIER ANGELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG, ZHOU DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER ZHOU, DONG DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT TO MAY-25-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE WHO SAID HE IS IN THE HOSPITAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, ZHOU DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER ZHOU, DONG DBA DONG NATURAL TREATMENT CENTER
